verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is a single-pass transmembrane protein with an extracellular immunoglobulin-like ectodomain. It is stably integrated into the plasma membrane with genuine outer-leaflet topology. However, it is expressed exclusively or predominantly in the male germline (spermatogenic cells/sperm) and is not broadly surface-accessible across somatic tissues. Its surface display is restricted to a narrow developmental lineage despite having its own membrane anchor.
